Disclaimer

Last updated: May 2026

Not Medical Advice

The content on Don't Lose Your Way is for informational and reflective purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of qualified health providers with questions about mental health conditions.

Not Crisis Intervention

This platform is not a crisis intervention service. If you or someone you know is in immediate danger, please call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or go to your nearest emergency room.

AI-Generated Content

The Chapel feature uses artificial intelligence to transform written feelings into creative expression (lyrics, music). This content is generated for personal reflection and artistic expression only. It is not therapy, counseling, or professional advice.

No Guarantees

We make no guarantees about the effectiveness of this platform for any particular purpose. The resources listed are provided as-is and do not constitute an endorsement of any organization.

User Responsibility

By using this platform, you accept full responsibility for your own well-being and acknowledge that this is a space for reflection — not treatment.

If you are in crisis, please call or text 988 — 24/7, free, and confidential.

Stay.

About Disclaimer Terms Privacy Policy AI Disclosure Crisis Protocol Crisis: 988

This site is intended for individuals 13 and older.

This space exists for people who almost gave up — and stayed.

If you're in immediate distress or thinking about harming yourself, please reach out now.

Call or text 988 — 24/7 • Free • Confidential
